arts.ttl: Barcelona to pull out of Champions League duties
arts.sum: The club has also submitted another request to UEFA for a minute of silence before the Champions League match —the first to be held at Montjuïc without Carles Miñarro. In recent hours, the Catalan club has submitted a request to UEFA regarding the Champions League clash against Benfica (10pm ET): that no player be required to attend the pre-match press conference .

arts.ttl: Agent working on transfer for months – Chelsea against Barcelona for huge deal
arts.sum: Chelsea are in the picture to sign AC Milan’s Rafael Leão in the summer window, according to Calciomercato. The left winger has managed 10 goals and nine assists from 39 games this season and the Blues are said to be keen. arts.ttl: Newcastle and Watford chasing midfielder offered to Barcelona – Agent pushing for free transfer
arts.sum: Millonarios FC’s Néiser Villarreal is on Newcastle United, Watford and Barcelona’s transfer agenda. That’s according to Monday’s edition of Sport, and they mention Newcastle and Watford in a report that focuses on Barelona. The 19-year-old’s contract expires at the end of this year and his future is set to be away from Millonarios. arts.ttl: Arsenal line up SHOCK €60m signing: Arteta targets Barcelona ‘STANDOUT’
arts.sum: Arteta sees Kounde as a strategic signing for Arsenal because of his ability to play either right-back or centre-back to a high level. Arsenal line up SHOCK €60m signing: Arteta targets Barcelona ‘STANDOUT’

arts.ttl: How Barca can beat Benfica and ease into UCL quarter-finals
arts.sum: With Benfica not able to call upon the excellence of Alvaro Carreras after he was booked in the first-leg of the Round of 16 tie last week, the hosts could have even richer pickings than usual when Lamine Yamal gets forward. If Olmo is benched of course, that affords De Jong the opportunity to play further forward and break through the lines.

arts.ttl: Two Barcelona stars were ‘most affected’ by death of club doctor
arts.sum: Barcelona stars Dani Olmo and Gavi were the two members of the Blaugrana’s first-team squad hit hardest by the news of Carles Miñarro Garcia’s passing. That’s according to Mundo Deportivo,…

arts.ttl: Barcelona star’s future thrown ‘up in the air’ as English & Spanish clubs circle
arts.sum: A member of the goalkeeper ranks at La Liga giants Barcelona has seen his future with the club thrown firmly up in the air. That’s according to transfer insider Matteo…

arts.ttl: Should Arsenal make a move for Barcelona target that rejected move to La Liga club in summer transfer window?
arts.sum: An Arsenal target claims he rejected a move to Barcelona in the summer transfer window amidst speculation that Mikel Arteta wants to revamp his forward line.

arts.ttl: Rayo Vallecano name asking price for Barcelona target
arts.sum: Rayo Vallecano have made their asking price known for star defender and rumoured Barcelona transfer target Andrei Rațiu. Rațiu’s name has of course proven a prominent one in the transfer…
